templates.name: The Grand Tour
templates.description: Berlin → Paris → Rome → Vienna → Prague. The historical heart of Europe in one long week, each stop a world capital.

templates.name: Balkan Adventure
templates.tagline: Ljubljana to Athens the long way
templates.description: A wild, affordable arc through the Balkans — Alpine lakes, Ottoman bazaars, Orthodox monasteries and ancient Greece. Includes non-DiscoverEU side trips.

templates.name: Nordic Lights
templates.description: Copenhagen → Stockholm → Oslo → Helsinki. Design cities, fjord trains and midnight sun. The most expensive route on the list, but unforgettable.

templates.name: Mediterranean Coast
templates.description: Barcelona → French Riviera → Cinque Terre → Dubrovnik → Athens. Follow the coast, swim every day, eat your weight in tomatoes.

templates.name: Green Rail
templates.tagline: Europe's best train routes, zero flights
templates.description: Amsterdam → Berlin → Zurich → Vienna → Ljubljana. Entirely on rail, through Europe's most scenic corridors. Lowest CO₂ footprint on the list.

templates.name: Inclusion First
templates.tagline: High accessibility, LGBTQ+ safe, level streets
templates.description: Amsterdam → Berlin → Copenhagen → Stockholm → Helsinki. Five of Europe's most wheelchair-friendly and rainbow-safe capitals, connected by step-free trains and ferries.

templates.name: Budget Backpacker
templates.description: Kraków → Bratislava → Budapest → Bucharest → Sofia → Athens. The cheapest corridor in the EU: hostel beds under €15, full meals under €8.

templates.name: Turkish Bridge
templates.description: The Turkish bonus corridor — start in Istanbul, take the Sofia Express into the DiscoverEU network, then continue west to Central Europe. Requires Schengen visa for Turkish participants.
